flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Portland fell 17% between 2021 and 2024 (3.6k → 3.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Portland rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($49.9k → $58.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Portland rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($49.9k → $58.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Portland fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.2% → 0.0%).
